ddt:Target.Name: N_P33A_PBD_UDS_PT_2021_10_18
ddt:Target.Description:
[14]2021/10/18 Renault HHN Siye BYUN, Hoyun LEE Auto-identification correction for SW8 Diag version : 32 / Supplier : BROSE / Soft : E54217-104 / Version : C134i
[13]2021/06/10 Renault HHN Siye BYUN, Hoyun LEE Auto-identification correction Diag version : 32 / Supplier : BROSE / Soft : E54217-103 / Version : C132i
[12]2021/02/23 Renault HHN Siye BYUN, Hoyun LEE Generic routine control add Lost communication with HFM add
[11]2021/01/14 Renault HHN Siye BYUN, Hoyun LEE Further modification due to missing $F0D0 & $F0D1
[10] 2020/10/22 Renault HHN Siye BYUN, Hoyun LEE Modified based on the diagnosis appendix v3.1
[9]Oct 23rd, 2020 Nissan XX6 Implemented Diag version from communication spec.
[8]Mar 26th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified DM/FFD/WS items, based on Rev11-14.
[7]Jan 8th, 2020 Nissan XX6 Modified DM and WS items, based on Rev10.
[6]Sep 3rd, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Item: DM.
[5]Aug 26th, 2019 Nissan XX6 Modified Item: DM.
[4]Nov 1st, 2018 Nissan XX6 Modify Item: DM(3 item) Modify Request: DataRead_$0459
[3]Jul 4th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Added item: DTC(2 item), DM(1 item). Modified item: DM(2 item). Deleted item: DTC(4 item), DM(13 item).
[2]Mar 5th, 2018 Nissan XX6 Added DM data refer to Rev1.
[1]Jan 15th, 2017 Nissan XX6 Modified some data, and added RoutineControl.
[N]Jan 12th, 2017 Nissan XX6 Initial Creation.

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Item.Text: (TBD) ON , user requires back door movement(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0423_#004_bit0_ LH Spindle Motor Duty Cycle

Item.Text: 0V is seen on Hall sensor (low level)(00h)
12V is seen on Hall sensor (high level)(01h)
0V is seen on Hall sensor (low level)(00h)
12V is seen on Hall sensor (high level)(01h)

Data.Name: DataRead_$0428_#004_bit0_ RH Spindle Motor Duty Cycle

Item.Text: 0V is seen on Hall sensor (low level)(00h)
12V is seen on Hall sensor(high level)(01h)
(TBD) OFF: Latch is closed (1st position or 2nd position)(00h)
(TBD) OFF: Latch is in middle position or open side(00h)
(TBD) ON: Latch is in end position or open side(01h)
(TBD) OFF: Latch is in middle position or open side(00h)
(TBD) ON: Latch is in end position or open side(01h)
(TBD) Vehicle not locked from the outside by the customer(00h)
(TBD) Vehicle Locked from the outside by the customer(01h)
(TBD) Lock&Close Refused due to Door condition(01h)
(TBD) Lock&Close Refused due to Authent Failure(02h)
(TBD) Sleep or Crank fault, Disable DiagMuxDTC(00h)
(TBD)0 OPEN SW failure in continuous operation(00h)
(TBD)1 OPEN SW failure in continuous operation(01h)
(TBD)2 OPEN SW failure in continuous operation(02h)
(TBD)3 OPEN SW failure in continuous operation(03h)
(TBD) Abnormal condition and latch stand alone condition(01h)
(TBD) Normal status and possible to operate condition (03h)
(TBD)0 CLOSE SW failure in continuous operation(00h)
(TBD)1 CLOSE SW failure in continuous operation(01h)
(TBD)2 CLOSE SW failure in continuous operation(02h)
(TBD)3 CLOSE SW failure in continuous operation(03h)
Side door lock closure switch not present(00h)
Side door lock closure switch present(01h)

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: This is routine for PBD learning procedure
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Item.Text: Learning procedure of mechanical maximum opening

Request.Name: RoutineControl.Start_$0400_(TBD)Learning procedure of mechanical maximum opening
RoutineControl.Start_$0401_(TBD)clear procedure of mechanical maximum opening
DataRead.DataRead_$0428_#004_bit0_ RH Spindle Motor Duty Cycle

DataItem.Name: DataRead_$0428_#004_bit0_ RH Spindle Motor Duty Cycle

Request.Name: DataRead.DataRead_$0423_#004_bit0_ LH Spindle Motor Duty Cycle

DataItem.Name: DataRead_$0423_#004_bit0_ LH Spindle Motor Duty Cycle

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000
